The '''Foerost Siege''' was a two-[[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] that the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] imposed on the [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union's]] [[Foerost Shipyards]]. It was finally broken in the [[Battle of Foerost (Clone Wars)|Battle of Foerost]] when [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Dua Ningo/Legends|Dua Ningo]] breached the blockade with the [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Confederate Navy's]] new [[Bulwark Fleet]].
